expectations.text: Output is valid JSON with id, name, description, variant, systemPrompt fields
expectations.evidence: All five fields present and well-formed

expectations.text: variant field is set to BP or bp (not EP)
Drill restricts to BP only (no tu, no enclisis, no EP forms in the system prompt or examples)
Fixed 5-question opener uses singular subjects only (eu, voce, ele/ela) — no plural forms (nos, eles, vocês conjugations) per A1 atomic-focus principle
expectations.evidence: Q3 in the FIXED 5-question opener uses 'Nós ______ moramos' and Q4 uses 'Eles ______ vivem' — both plural conjugations introduced in the A1 fixed opener, violating singular-before-plural

expectations.text: morar examples target residence contexts (city, address, where you live)
expectations.evidence: Q1 (São Paulo), Q3 (Copacabana apt), Q5 (where you live)

expectations.text: viver examples target being-alive or quality-of-life contexts (not residence)
All Portuguese example sentences include English translations or glosses
expectations.evidence: Every PT example in welcome message and feedback has English in parens

expectations.text: No fake accents on Portuguese words (no spurious accents like *moro vs móro, no ele vs êle)
Includes vocabulary scaffolding (defines connector words like em, onde, com before use)
expectations.evidence: Welcome message defines key constructions (morar + em + place, viver + bem/feliz/com), conjugation tables provided
